monitor.capture_what: the pathlib.Path object (self) whose string representation contains the user-controlled ref value joined with BASE_EXPORT_DIR

oracle_check.condition_description: The string representation of the Path object passed as self to write_text contains a directory traversal sequence (.. followed by a path separator), confirming that the user-controlled ref parameter escaped the intended BASE_EXPORT_DIR.
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_PATH_INJECTION: directory traversal detected in write_text path — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
